faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my Glen Oaks home and family?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and professional-grade equipment designed specifically for safe wasp elimination. Our technicians are fully licensed and trained in safe removal techniques that protect your family, pets, and landscaping. faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Glen Oaks, Queens?
faqs.answer: Glen Oaks properties commonly experience issues with yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. Yellow jackets often nest in wall voids and underground, paper wasps build umbrella-shaped nests under eaves and overhangs, and bald-faced hornets create large aerial nests in trees and bushes. We're experienced in removing all wasp species found in Queens.
